ddls:
CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., Manager of the Year, Player of the Year) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., Manager, Player) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the award (e.g., annually, bi-annually) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the award was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the award was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., American League, National League) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the league was created in the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the league was last updated in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "player_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the player (e.g., altobjo01) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., pitcher, outfielder) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Current team of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the player's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "manager_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the manager (e.g., lasorto01) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the manager */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the manager */,
  "team" TEXT /* Current team of the manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manager was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manager's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_winners" (
  "award_winner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award winner */,
  "award_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award won */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the award was won in */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the award (if applicable) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager who won the award (if applicable) */,
  "points_won" INTEGER /* Number of points won by the award winner */,
  "points_max" INTEGER /* Maximum number of points possible */,
  "votes_first" INTEGER /* Number of first-place votes received by the award winner */,
  "position_in_voting" TEXT /* Position of the winner in the voting (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the award winner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the award winner was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the award winner's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_winner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_winners_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_winners_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_winners_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_award_winners_award_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_id") REFERENCES awards ("award_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voters" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "voter_name" TEXT /* Full name of the voter */,
  "voter_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the voter */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the voter */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the voter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the voter was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the voter's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "award_winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award winner the vote was cast for */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter who cast the vote */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was cast */,
  "vote_rank" TEXT /* Rank of the vote (e.g., 1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points assigned to the vote */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vote was cast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES voters ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_award_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_winner_id") REFERENCES award_winners ("award_winner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, voter, viewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
